old_value: {"id":"glitch-nhu","title":"Wire network loop into game tick","description":"Sans-I/O networking machinery is built (NetworkNode, NetworkAction, packet encode/decode) but the game loop never calls it. Wire NetworkNode into the Rust tick loop so packets actually flow. Single biggest blocker for multiplayer.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"zeblith@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-18T14:18:29Z","created_by":"Jake Englund","updated_at":"2026-03-18T14:18:29Z"}
